title: Universal Cross Back Chair Cushion - Burlap - Velcro Ties
features: Canvas Tie Back Cushions for Cross Back ChairsAdd comfort and style to your seating with this Universal Cross Back Chair Cushion, designed to fit seamlessly with most cross back chairs.
Crafted with a durable foam interior, it provides supportive comfort for guests during long events, while the fabric cover ensures easy cleaning and long-lasting use.
The cushion secures firmly in place with convenient Velcro ties, preventing slipping or shifting throughout the event.
Its universal sizing makes it a versatile choice for rental companies, event planners, and venues looking for reliable seating upgrades.
Perfect for weddings, banquets, and special occasions, this cushion enhances both the comfort and appearance of your cross back chairs—delivering a professional look and a better guest experience.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 200 or more
